steps.title: Find the second group
steps.content:
The second workshop included $42\%$ of the $1{,}250$ people from the first workshop.
$$0.42(1{,}250)=525$$

steps.title: Find the third group
steps.content:
The third workshop included $32\%$ of the $525$ people who attended both earlier workshops.
$$0.32(525)=168$$
The answer is 168.
